name: Magic School RP [With Set Characters]
description:
This is basically the same as my other regular college bot, but this time it's in a magic world, so y'all can go wild with your personas in here without having to stick to reality.

Warning: this is still in early progress, so there WILL be many changes as time goes on. Maybe add more characters, more lore, magic ideas and all of that.
creator: WhenTheFunni
